feature_type: 4 independent deterministic-script/skill-prose bugfixes inside plugins/sdd-quality-loop/ (+ one plugins/sdd-ship/skills/ship/SKILL.md prose reference), no in-spec or external dependency between streams

checks.finding: design.md:36-146 (## Architecture mermaid, immediately followed by ## Components and ## Layer Specifications) together describe: (1) component boundaries via 4 stream subgraphs S1-S4 (lines 40-82); (2) integration with existing components via explicit edges (RUNALL_SH -> QGCL_TEST line 52, PPI_SH -> IMPL_RPT line 71, PROBE -.-> VRC_SH line 81) plus Technical Summary prose (lines 10-34); (3) technology per component/layer via the Components table's Technology column (lines 87-100, e.g. 'Bash / PowerShell twins', 'Markdown', 'GitHub Actions YAML') and Layer Specifications table (139-146) which states UX/Frontend N/A, Infra: CI-registration staging, Security: path-containment. design.md:38-83 (## Architecture mermaid) contains explicit directed edges (e.g. QGCL_TEST->QGCL_SH, QGCL_TEST->QGCL_PS, RUNALL_SH->QGCL_TEST, ERR_TEST->ERR_SH/PS, PPI_TEST->PPI_SH/PS, PPI_SH->IMPL_RPT, VRC_TEST->VRC_SH, JQSHIM-.->VRC_TEST, PROBE-.->VRC_SH, SHIP_HC-.->SHIP_LIVE, TESTYML_HC-.->TESTYML_LIVE). design.md:197-392 ## API / Contract Plan enumerates every new/changed contract for all 4 streams (check-quality-gate-cycle-limit's new 2-required-arg CLI contract lines 199-246; ship/SKILL.md Step 4 human-copy edit 248-257; .github/workflows/test.yml CI step 259-274; emit-run-record.sh/.ps1 VERDICT-anchored read replacing the unanchored scan 276-303; prepare-panelist-input.sh/.ps1 recursion + declared-outputs completeness check 305-342; cross-model-verify/SKILL.md pre-panel readiness step text 344-372; validate-review-context-set.sh tr -d '\r' sites 374-392), each specifying request shape (args/table rows), response shape (exit code, stdout/stderr contract), and explicitly flags Stream 1's CLI-contract change as breaking (requirements.md Risks, cross-referenced at design.md:581-583). Equivalent-to-HTTP method/path/schema coverage present for a CLI/skill-prose feature type.

design.md:507-517 ## Security Boundaries table names 4 trust boundaries (B1 declared-outputs vs bundle root, B2 identity-ledger jq CRLF vs record-hash recomputation, B3 protected files vs agent-direct edits, B4 fixture world vs real state), states the auth/authz mechanism at each (path-containment check, tr -d '\r' scope restriction, human-copy + MANIFEST.sha256, mktemp fixture isolation), states data classification per row ('internal repository content only' / 'internal source only'), and lists OWASP concerns per row (Path Traversal, Tampering non-regression, Security Misconfiguration, Test Isolation). All 4 required sub-items present.

SKIP: Feature Type header (design.md:5) reads '4 independent deterministic-script/skill-prose bugfixes inside plugins/sdd-quality-loop/ ... no in-spec or external dependency between streams' -- not a literal enumerated value, but ux-spec.md:1-17 and frontend-spec.md:1-8 both explicitly state 'N/A -- no change: ... design.md:394-433 ## Test Strategy covers unit scope (item 1: fixture-driven RED/GREEN pairs per stream; item 2: 4 discrete declared-outputs fixtures per WFI-014 discipline; item 4: 'pure fixture-driven function/script testing' with no runtime-budget assertion), integration/cross-boundary scope (item 3: portable CRLF jq-shim exercising the defect across the 3-OS matrix; item 5: full-suite runs 'bash tests/run-all.sh' and 'pwsh tests/run-all.ps1'; item 6: CI self-registration grep-check), and acceptance-criteria verification via named TEST IDs (TEST-004, TEST-010, TEST-014..017, TEST-022..025, TEST-007) cross-referenced against acceptance-tests.md's explicit 1:1 AC<->TEST mapping and design.md's own Cross-Layer Dependencies table (155-165) tying every REQ to its AC and TEST range. Concrete command names ('bash ./tests/quality-gate-cycle-limit.tests.sh', 'bash tests/run-all.sh', 'pwsh tests/run-all.ps1') are named. No fullstack critical-user-journey E2E requirement applies (non-UI feature, ux-spec.md/frontend-spec.md N/A).

Every component node named in design.md:38-83 (## Architecture) and referenced throughout ## API / Contract Plan is defined: QGCL_SH/PS, QGCL_TEST, ERR_SH/PS, ERR_TEST, PPI_SH/PS, PPI_TEST, CMV, VRC_SH/PS, VRC_TEST are all rows in the ## Components table (85-100); SHIP_HC/TESTYML_HC staging and SHIP_LIVE/TESTYML_LIVE targets are defined in ## Protected-File Statement (108-137); PROBE (loop_validator_capability_probe) is defined in Components' 'Real surfaces exercised READ-ONLY' note (102-106); JQSHIM is defined via Test Strategy item 3 (409-415) and security-spec.md's Security Tests row; RUNALL_SH and IMPL_RPT are established pre-existing repository components independently documented in investigation.md (INV-005, INV-015). No undefined component reference found.
